title: trisetum longiglume
intro: Trisetum longiglume is a species of grass within the family Poaceae, commonly found in dry grasslands and open woods in China and Korea. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and fever, as it is believed to possess anti-inflammatory and antipyretic effects. The health benefits of Trisetum longiglume include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate headaches, making it a valuable remedy for various health conditions. Trisetum longiglume can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, allowing for its medicinal properties to be harnessed in a convenient and accessible way.
